title: Megalodon Origin
description: A simple mod that adds a Megalodon Origin for the Origins mod as well as a rework for the "Land-Shark" Origin from Origins++
body:
Adds a Megalodon Origin for the Origins Mod, and a reworked version of the Land Shark Origin from Origins ++. Fabric Only.
requires Origins and Pehkui. 

I made this mod because a server I am playing on couldn't load datapacks for some reason, and try as I might I couldn't help them... so I instead packed my datapack as a mod!
# Origins in this Mod:
## Megalodon Origin
> **A very Big Shark.** Similar to the Origins++ "Land Shark" Origin, but without the land and a few buffs to compensate
### Legendary Size
> Stories tell of sharks as big as ships, able to swallow entire boats whole...

The player becomes 4.5 blocks tall
### Fish Lungs
> You can't be out of water for long unless you have _water breathing_ or are under the effects of an active _Conduit_. Being in water on the other hand gives you greater vision, the ability to breath, and allows you to mine as if you weren't under water
### The Hungering One
> You need a lot more food to Survive
### Carnivore
> You can only eat Meat
### Fishy Limbs
> You can't move on land without flopping like a fish... unless you are under the effects of an active _Conduit_
### Strong Swimmer
> You move faster in water 

Dolphin's Grace while in water
### Like Water
> You don't sink in water
### Megalodon Charge
> Charge forward with great speed
### Megalodon's Might
> You hit like, well, a Giant Shark

When wielding a weapon, you do +75% damage. without a weapon, you do 4 damage.
### No Shield
> You can't use a shield
### Natural Armor
> Even without armor, your skin provides a small amount of natural protection

## Land-Shark Rework
### Carnivore
> you can only eat meat
### Aqua Affinity
> you can mine under water just as you would on land
### Like Water
> you don't sink in water
### Fragile
> you have 7 hearts instead of 10
### No Shield
> You can't use a shield
### Fins
> You get slowness 2 while on land... unless you are in the rain or under the effects of an active _Conduit_

In conduit power, you get slowness 1 instead
### Gill Lungs
> You thrive under the water, but leaving the water makes you dry out unless you are in the rain or under the effects of an active _Conduit_

This also adds a dehydration mechanic. as a land-shark, you take 60 seconds to dehydrate when out of water.
### Bigger Stomach
> You need more food to survive
### Lunge
> Charge forward with great speed
### Razor Sharp Teeth
> You deal 3 more damage due to your increased strength and powerful jaws
### Fast Swimmer
> You swim faster in water (Dolphins Grace)
